英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓
zh.Bradley, Hampshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭哈普爾布拉德利
zh.Sefton, Lancashire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓
zh.Brundon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭素福爾可布盧登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Molyneux於1396年10月5日出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親Richard Molyneux28歲，母親Ellen DeUrswick32歲。他於大約1415年與Ellen Radcliffe在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1446年在英國英格蘭素福爾可布盧登被列為henry vi granted to sir richard molyneux, and richard his son and their heirs male, the offices of master forester of westderbishir, steward of westderbishir and salfordshir, and constable of lyverpoll castle. after cancellation of grants for life made 10 feb. 1441。他去世於1459年9月23日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年62歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾澤福頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Molyneux于1396年10月5日出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，他的父亲Richard Molyneux28岁，母亲Ellen DeUrswick32岁。他于大约1415年与Ellen Radcliffe在英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1446年在英国英格兰素福爾可布盧登被列为henry vi granted to sir richard molyneux, and richard his son and their heirs male, the offices of master forester of westderbishir, steward of westderbishir and salfordshir, and constable of lyverpoll castle. after cancellation of grants for life made 10 feb. 1441。他去世于1459年9月23日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾享年62岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾澤福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Molyneux was born on 5 October 1396, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard Molyneux, was 28 and his mother, Ellen DeUrswick, was 32. He married Ellen Radcliffe about 1415, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1446, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as henry vi granted to sir richard molyneux, and richard his son and their heirs male, the offices of master forester of westderbishir, steward of westderbishir and salfordshir, and constable of lyverpoll castle. after cancellation of grants for life made 10 feb. 1441 in Brundon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. He died on 23 September 1459, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Sefton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Molyneux est né le 5 octobre 1396, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Molyneux, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ellen DeUrswick, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Radcliffe environ 1415, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1446, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est henry vi granted to sir richard molyneux, and richard his son and their heirs male, the offices of master forester of westderbishir, steward of westderbishir and salfordshir, and constable of lyverpoll castle. after cancellation of grants for life made 10 feb. 1441 à Brundon, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1459, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Molyneux am 5. Oktober 1396 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Molyneux 28 und seine Mutter Ellen DeUrswick 32. Er hat um 1415 in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Ellen Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1446, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als henry vi granted to sir richard molyneux, and richard his son and their heirs male, the offices of master forester of westderbishir, steward of westderbishir and salfordshir, and constable of lyverpoll castle. after cancellation of grants for life made 10 feb. 1441 in Brundon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. September 1459 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sefton, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Molyneux è nato il il 5 ottobre 1396 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Richard Molyneux, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Ellen DeUrswick, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Radcliffe circa 1415, nel Sefton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1446, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come henry vi granted to sir richard molyneux, and richard his son and their heirs male, the offices of master forester of westderbishir, steward of westderbishir and salfordshir, and constable of lyverpoll castle. after cancellation of grants for life made 10 feb. 1441 nel Brundon, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 23 settembre 1459, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Sefton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Molyneuxが1396年10月5日にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Richard Molyneuxは28歳，母Ellen DeUrswickは32歳であった。約1415年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでEllen Radcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1446年，49歳の時，イギリスイギリススフォルクブルンドンでの職業はhenry vi granted to sir richard molyneux, and richard his son and their heirs male, the offices of master forester of westderbishir, steward of westderbishir and salfordshir, and constable of lyverpoll castle. after cancellation of grants for life made 10 feb. 1441と記録されている。彼は1459年9月23日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで62歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアセフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Molyneux(이)가 1396년 10월 5일 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Molyneux(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen DeUrswick(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Ellen Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1446년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브런던에서 henry vi granted to sir richard molyneux, and richard his son and their heirs male, the offices of master forester of westderbishir, steward of westderbishir and salfordshir, and constable of lyverpoll castle. after cancellation of grants for life made 10 feb. 1441이었다. 그는 1459년 9월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.5 October 1396–23 September 1459: 5 de outubro de 1396–23 de setembro de 1459
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Molyneux nasceu em 5 de outubro de 1396, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Molyneux, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Ellen DeUrswick, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Radcliffe aproximadamente 1415, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1446, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como henry vi granted to sir richard molyneux, and richard his son and their heirs male, the offices of master forester of westderbishir, steward of westderbishir and salfordshir, and constable of lyverpoll castle. after cancellation of grants for life made 10 feb. 1441 em Brundon, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1459, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Molyneux родился 5 октября 1396 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Molyneux было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen DeUrswick, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Radcliffe около 1415 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1446 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии henry vi granted to sir richard molyneux, and richard his son and their heirs male, the offices of master forester of westderbishir, steward of westderbishir and salfordshir, and constable of lyverpoll castle. after cancellation of grants for life made 10 feb. 1441 в местности брундон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 23 сентября 1459 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.5 October 1396–23 September 1459: 5 de octubre de 1396–23 de septiembre de 1459
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Molyneux nació el 5 de octubre de 1396, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Molyneux, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Ellen DeUrswick, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Ellen Radcliffe aproximadamente 1415, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1446, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era henry vi granted to sir richard molyneux, and richard his son and their heirs male, the offices of master forester of westderbishir, steward of westderbishir and salfordshir, and constable of lyverpoll castle. after cancellation of grants for life made 10 feb. 1441 en Brundon, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1459, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
